plan.failureSummary: The test failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because it attempted to fill a 'Last Name' field that is not present in the current UI (which displays 'Set 2' of the survey with a 'Your Name' field instead).
observedIndicators: failure screenshot shows 'Set 2' form with 'Your Name' field
tool call attempted to interact with '#\\:r0\\:-form-item' (Last Name) which is missing
overallObjective 'Fill out all survey questions' is semantically flexible

remediationSteps.details: Run the test again with the 'clearPageAiCache' directive. This will force page.ai to re-evaluate the page structure and adapt to 'Set 2' of the survey.

remediationSteps.summary: Evaluate suitability of DETERMINISTIC mode for this test.
remediationSteps.details: If the application frequently rotates form fields (A/B testing or intentional instability), consider disabling deterministic mode for this specific page.ai call to allow for real-time adaptation.

plan.notes: The 'unstable-survey' app appears to serve different form sets (the screenshot shows 'Set 2'). The cached deterministic instructions were likely recorded on a different form version containing a 'Last Name' field. Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to adapt to the current form structure.
